testcase.name: should_update_status_to_approved
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.197+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_update_status_request loan_id=ec2681fd-f09c-4d52-930f-f6c11b217631 from=SUBMITTED to=APPROVED correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.197+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_validate_transition from=SUBMITTED to=APPROVED correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.197+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_save_after_status_change loan_id=ec2681fd-f09c-4d52-930f-f6c11b217631 correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.197+07:00 INFO 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_application_approved loan_id=ec2681fd-f09c-4d52-930f-f6c11b217631 from_status=SUBMITTED to_status=APPROVED correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.197+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_update_status_complete loan_id=ec2681fd-f09c-4d52-930f-f6c11b217631 final_status=APPROVED correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_reject_loan_when_user_is_approver
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.198+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_update_status_request loan_id=d3058376-8170-4211-9de9-9d53e02b3d05 from=SUBMITTED to=REJECTED correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.198+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_validate_transition from=SUBMITTED to=REJECTED correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.198+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_save_after_status_change loan_id=d3058376-8170-4211-9de9-9d53e02b3d05 correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.198+07:00 INFO 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_application_rejected loan_id=d3058376-8170-4211-9de9-9d53e02b3d05 from_status=SUBMITTED to_status=REJECTED correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.198+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_update_status_complete loan_id=d3058376-8170-4211-9de9-9d53e02b3d05 final_status=REJECTED correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_throw_when_closing_loan_with_some_schedules_unpaid
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.199+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_update_status_request loan_id=55f18768-6622-4250-b76f-48212ae7e7b8 from=DISBURSED to=CLOSED correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.199+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_validate_transition from=DISBURSED to=CLOSED correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_create_loan_application_successfully
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.200+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_create_request customer_id=6e52276f-142b-4841-b48b-b7f5ac244f01 loan_amount=5000000 tenor=3 correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.200+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_save_request correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.200+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_saved loan_id=53129fcd-a88e-4a64-bafa-61c2ab3094f2 customer_id=6e52276f-142b-4841-b48b-b7f5ac244f01 correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.200+07:00 INFO 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_application_submitted loan_id=53129fcd-a88e-4a64-bafa-61c2ab3094f2 customer_id=6e52276f-142b-4841-b48b-b7f5ac244f01 correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_throw_on_invalid_status
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.201+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_find_by_status status=invalid correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_throw_when_update_status_not_found
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.202+07:00 WARN 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_not_found loan_id=acaca73e-4390-49c1-a19e-a48e7e545bf6 correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_find_by_status_successfully
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.203+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_find_by_status status=submitted correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.203+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_find_by_status_result status=submitted count=1 correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_throw_not_found_when_loan_application_does_not_exist
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.204+07:00 WARN 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_not_found loan_id=8e20af47-32a9-4883-9da9-8afce3cdd13f correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_throw_when_loan_already_in_final_status_rejected
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.205+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_update_status_request loan_id=64e1e640-c810-4f06-95f7-70f75b3988b0 from=REJECTED to=APPROVED correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.205+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_validate_transition from=REJECTED to=APPROVED correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_throw_not_found_when_customer_does_not_exist
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.206+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_create_request customer_id=6e52276f-142b-4841-b48b-b7f5ac244f01 loan_amount=5000000 tenor=3 correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.206+07:00 WARN 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_submit_failed reason=customer_not_found customer_id=6e52276f-142b-4841-b48b-b7f5ac244f01 correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_find_all_loan_applications
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.207+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_find_all correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.207+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_find_all_result count=2 correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_update_status_to_disbursed_and_generate_schedule
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.207+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_update_status_request loan_id=e3ba0520-8155-4243-807d-1c93ece459b4 from=APPROVED to=DISBURSED correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.207+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_validate_transition from=APPROVED to=DISBURSED correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.207+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_save_after_status_change loan_id=e3ba0520-8155-4243-807d-1c93ece459b4 correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.207+07:00 INFO 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_status_updated loan_id=e3ba0520-8155-4243-807d-1c93ece459b4 from_status=APPROVED to_status=DISBURSED correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.207+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_generating_schedule loan_id=e3ba0520-8155-4243-807d-1c93ece459b4 correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.207+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_update_status_complete loan_id=e3ba0520-8155-4243-807d-1c93ece459b4 final_status=DISBURSED correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_find_by_customer_id_successfully
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.208+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_find_by_customer customer_id=6e52276f-142b-4841-b48b-b7f5ac244f01 correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.208+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_find_by_customer_result customer_id=6e52276f-142b-4841-b48b-b7f5ac244f01 count=1 correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_update_status_to_rejected
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.209+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_update_status_request loan_id=d5d08358-be62-417b-912c-a47b42556615 from=SUBMITTED to=REJECTED correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.209+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_validate_transition from=SUBMITTED to=REJECTED correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.209+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_save_after_status_change loan_id=d5d08358-be62-417b-912c-a47b42556615 correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.209+07:00 INFO 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_application_rejected loan_id=d5d08358-be62-417b-912c-a47b42556615 from_status=SUBMITTED to_status=REJECTED correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.209+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_update_status_complete loan_id=d5d08358-be62-417b-912c-a47b42556615 final_status=REJECTED correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_throw_not_found_when_customer_id_does_not_exist_for_find_by
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.210+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_find_by_customer customer_id=6e52276f-142b-4841-b48b-b7f5ac244f01 correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.210+07:00 WARN 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=customer_not_found customer_id=6e52276f-142b-4841-b48b-b7f5ac244f01 correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_throw_when_closing_loan_with_empty_schedules
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.211+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_update_status_request loan_id=4d0515a0-2924-4ec8-af63-48be09842ec9 from=DISBURSED to=CLOSED correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.211+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_validate_transition from=DISBURSED to=CLOSED correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_throw_when_transition_from_submitted_to_disbursed
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.212+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_update_status_request loan_id=3c26ffff-dfd7-45a4-9874-8533dfcb146d from=SUBMITTED to=DISBURSED correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.212+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_validate_transition from=SUBMITTED to=DISBURSED correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_throw_when_transition_from_approved_to_rejected
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.213+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_update_status_request loan_id=42799618-ec98-4986-9f36-5e89624fe690 from=APPROVED to=REJECTED correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.213+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_validate_transition from=APPROVED to=REJECTED correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_approve_loan_when_user_is_approver
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T20:50:34.213+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_update_status_request loan_id=d76be446-3c61-46cf-b319-cd41ac8e59c6 from=SUBMITTED to=APPROVED correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.213+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_validate_transition from=SUBMITTED to=APPROVED correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.213+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_save_after_status_change loan_id=d76be446-3c61-46cf-b319-cd41ac8e59c6 correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.213+07:00 INFO 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_application_approved loan_id=d76be446-3c61-46cf-b319-cd41ac8e59c6 from_status=SUBMITTED to_status=APPROVED correlation_id=null 2026-06-23T20:50:34.213+07:00 DEBUG 72971 --- [training] [ main] c.e.t.service.LoanApplicationService : event=loan_update_status_complete loan_id=d76be446-3c61-46cf-b319-cd41ac8e59c6 final_status=APPROVED correlation_id=null

testcase.name: should_close_loan_when_all_schedules_are_paid
